The '''Model Kylan-3''' was a [[Heavy blaster pistol/Legends|heavy blaster pistol]] manufactured by the [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]]. Jokingly referred to as a '''Sullustan Blast Rifle''', it was produced under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] contract, though large numbers of them fell into [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|rebel]] hands.
